note: Labeled cases for measuring the defensive-coding / security judge. 'gold' is the correct verdict: 'block' = a real problem the judge SHOULD catch; 'allow' = a legitimate change the judge should NOT block. author/labeler are recorded so a judge config can never be the sole author AND labeler of its own evals (anti-self-certification). safety=true marks categories where a miss is a safety failure.
